hero.title: SaiPair
hero.subtitle: Free Tournament Management Software
hero.description: Open-source, offline-first desktop app for organizing tournaments. Swiss, Round Robin, Elimination and more — all in one place.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run a tournament
features.f1_desc: Swiss, Round Robin, Double Round Robin, Single & Double Elimination — choose the best format for your event.
features.f2_desc: Smart pairing engine handles all the complexity. Just click a button and pairings are generated instantly.
features.f3_desc: Rankings update in real time with configurable tiebreak rules — Buchholz, Sonneborn-Berger, and more.
features.f4_desc: No internet needed. All data stored locally. Back up and restore anytime with .saipair files.
features.f5_desc: Import players from Excel/CSV. Export rankings, cross tables, and pairings. TRF format supported.
features.f6_desc: Print rosters, pairings, rankings, cross tables, and player cards — formatted and ready to post.
features.f7_desc: Available in 10 languages — English, Chinese, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese, Arabic, Hindi, Bengali.
features.f8_desc: MIT licensed, forever free. Inspect the code, contribute, or fork it — it's yours.

formats.title: Tournament Formats
formats.subtitle: Pick the right format for your event
formats.swiss_desc: Each round pairs players with similar scores. Best for large groups with limited rounds.
formats.roundRobin_desc: Every player plays every other player. Best for small groups where fairness is a priority.
formats.elimination_desc: Losers are eliminated each round. Quick results with high spectator appeal.
formats.doubleElim_desc: Winners and losers brackets. Players get a second chance before being eliminated.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See SaiPair in action
screenshots.placeholder: Screenshots coming soon — download and try it yourself!

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Available for Windows, macOS, and Linux

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.subtitle: Built in the open, MIT licensed
openSource.description: SaiPair is free and open-source software. Inspect the code, report bugs, suggest features, or contribute — everyone is welcome.

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤ for tournament organizers worldwide.
